Entry.val: PRICECAP=If your order is not immediately executable-#- our systems may-#- depending on market conditions-#- reject your order if its limit price is more than the allowed amount away from the reference price at that time. If this happens-#- you will not receive a fill. This is a control designed to ensure that we comply with our regulatory obligations to avoid submitting disruptive orders to the marketplace._;_false_,_
